description: Stream provides APIs and SDKs for adding in-app chat messaging, video and audio calling, activity feeds, and AI moderation to applications. It operates the underlying realtime infrastructure while customers integrate the services into their own web, mobile, and backend apps.
summary: GetStream exposes four documented HTTP API surfaces for Chat, Video, Activity Feeds, and Moderation; Feeds and Video have documented API-key-plus-JWT request mechanics, while Chat and Moderation REST auth details are only partially documented in the pages reviewed. No public GraphQL API, MCP server, or CLI surface was found.
